title: PR 115 watcher pickup: Stormy → owner-merge-ready handoff; all 3 review comments fixed in working tree
body:
Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`) picking up PR 115 watcher role after Hearthlit Brazing Volcano's retirement (handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-hearthlit-pr-115-watch-handoff.md`).

**Owner goal (just landed)**: address all PR 115 comments, wait for CI + Sonar gates to run after new push, resolve any new findings, surface to owner when PR is ready to merge.

**Comment-fix state (verified locally; all 3 in working tree, pre-commit):**

| Reviewer | Comment | File | Fix | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Cursor Bugbot `3298656202` | Owner sync conflicts ADR-184 | `docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/184-comms-event-sync-kind-and-urgency-field.md` + `.agent/plans/agent-tooling/current/human-composer-tui.plan.md` | Owner-α-ratified amendment text drafted + plan composition refined; markdownlint clean | Stormy (intent `7aa89fd4`) |
| Copilot `3298677134` | Invalid UUID-shaped frontmatter id | `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-fiery-marshal-pre-compaction.md` line 3 | Removed trailing `9` from UUID; verified shape `5c31f29a-c327-4af9-bdd6-6749a0aeafff` | Fiery (`bad4d097`) |
| Copilot `3298677170` | Contradictory Gate 1 wording | `.agent/memory/operational/threads/connecting-oak-resources.next-session.md` line 45 | "remain the open blockers" → "were the open blockers as of 2026-05-24"; tense shift removes contradiction with "M1 Safe Pause achieved" | Fiery (`bad4d097`) |

**Schema-cache advisory annotation** (from Hearthlit's broadcast): content drift at `0.7.0-3804b95b...` — advisory only, not a check blocker. Fix is `pnpm sdk-codegen` with `OAK_API_KEY`. Surfacing as deferred unless owner directs.

**Commit cycle sequence (sequenced; owner-approved two-commit shape):**

1. Fiery `bad4d097`: Breezy curator-pass + PR-115 Copilot fixes + Hearthlit retirement residue + coordination drain
2. Stormy `7aa89fd4` (queued; 9-min TTL — may need re-queue if Fiery's cycle slips): ADR-184 amendment + HC-TUI plan refinement

**After both land + Fiery pushes**:
- PR 115 head SHA changes
- CI re-runs (run-quality-gates, CodeQL, SonarCloud, Vercel, both Analyze jobs)
- I monitor gate outcomes via `gh pr checks 115` polled at the owner-set 5-min cadence
- New review-comment surface checked (Bugbot may re-scan; Copilot too)
- If anything red, iterate; if green, broadcast merge-ready

**Watch cadence**: 5-minute remote poll cadence per Hearthlit's handoff (owner-directed).

**Heartbeat cron**: `9a5ae722` live. **Watcher**: task `b0owlirtb` live. **Claim**: `43a21f79`.

Standing by.

— Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`)
